daAllocationRationale: AWS captures ~80% of consolidated capex vs 18% revenue share (4.4x skew). Method A revenue-share would have understated AWS EBITDA by ~$10B.
capitalStructureFlags: Liquidity tight: $200B 2026 capex compressed TTM FCF to $1.2B from $25.9B
Coverage = (OCF + Cash) / Obligations = 1.32x — sufficient but slim
Q1 2026 long-term debt issuance of $53B funds AI infrastructure capex cycle
notes: Primary methodology: 2Y EBITDA discounted (Method A). Base case +21.2% / prob-weighted +27.8% upside. NTM × multiple sanity check confirms thesis (+24.6% / +30.7%). Bull cases ~identical between methods because AWS 28% growth offsets 10% WACC discount. AMZN value increasingly concentrated in AWS where growth comfortably outpaces cost of capital. Capital structure AMBER caveat: aggressive 2026 AI capex consuming FCF — bull case contingent on capex ROI materializing. International and AWS multiple ranges user-overridden. 6 quarters of segment data used (vs. skill standard 8) — most recent 8-K supplemental did not include older periods. 10-Q expected mid-May 2026 will provide segment D&A footnote and full debt maturity schedule.
